articles.title: The first quarter horror show that undid CSK
articles.description: The result was a foregone conclusion the moment CSK were reduced to 43/4 after the first ten overs

articles.title: East Austin Shooting: Two injured outside Sam’s BBQ as police hunt for suspect - What we know so far
articles.description: A shooting outside Sam's BBQ in East Austin left two people injured. The incident occurred late Sunday night near Chicon and Alamo streets. Police responded swiftly and are searching for the suspect who fled the scene. Both victims were hospitalized. Authorities state there is no immediate threat to the public. The investigation is ongoing.

articles.title: Centre targets Northeast insurgency with 2029 deadline, first focus on Manipur
articles.description: The realignment of CAPF is likely to begin after the culmination of the ongoing assembly elections in West Bengal and the Amarnath Yatra.

articles.title: Rossell Techsys targets 2-year leap to match 14-year growth
articles.description: Rossell Techsys targets 2-year leap to match 14-year growth

articles.title: NIA begins probe on suspected terror angle in Bengal crude bomb recovery case
articles.description: The state police recovered 79 round-shaped objects suspected to be crude bombs, tied with jute ropes, along with other incriminating materials from South 24 Parganas district on April 25.

articles.title: ‘I wasn’t worried’: Trump downplays White House Correspondents' Dinner shooting, pushes to reschedule gala within 30 days
articles.description: US President Trump expressed no worry following a shooting at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, praising security's swift action and advocating for the event's continuation. He clashed with an interviewer over the attacker's manifesto, attributing the incident to a "sick guy" and broader political "hate speech."

articles.title: 40 years ago April 27, 1986: Journalists’ arrests in Orissa
articles.description: This is the front page of The Indian Express published on April 27, 1986.

articles.title: Parking norms for star hotels near airport may be slashed by 50%
articles.description: As per BMC’s proposal, concessions on parking norms would be applicable for star-category hotels, subject to the condition that full parking requirements under regulation 44 would apply if the building’s use changes in future

articles.title: US-Pakistan tango: This risky double-game may dent Islamabad’s relations with Beijing, and also cause international humiliation
articles.description: Iran's foreign minister refused to meet a US delegation in Pakistan, exposing Islamabad's risky diplomatic tightrope walk. This move, allegedly influenced by Pakistan's army chief, highlights regional power plays and potential friction with China. The article suggests the US seeks a face-saving victory amid geopolitical tensions with Iran.

articles.title: Polluting tag on over 50% industries in MMR
articles.description: The environment department, which is already working on stringent measures against highly polluting industries, will impose higher penalties to address the situation, officials said

articles.title: 'I just want to go home': Visibly-shaken Erika Kirk breaks down during WHCD evacuation - Watch Viral Video
articles.description: Panic erupted at the White House Correspondents' Dinner when an armed man opened fire, forcing an evacuation. A viral video shows Erika Kirk, visibly distraught, pleading to go home, her reaction amplified by the recent loss of her husband to gun violence. The suspect, identified as Cole Allen, faces federal charges after allegedly shooting a Secret Service agent.

articles.title: Work begins on ₹423 crore integrated GB Pant campus in Okhla
articles.description: The government will establish an integrated GB Pant engineering college campus in Okhla, with completion expected by December 2028 at ₹423.6 crore.

articles.title: Who is Lexie Brown? All about the woman linked to Klay Thompson as Megan Thee Stallion accuses him of betrayal
articles.description: Megan Thee Stallion and Klay Thompson’s year old high profile relationship has come to a dramatic end after she accused him of cheating on her, sparking chaos. While Klay Thompson has remained silent about the cheating rumors and their break up, he has been linked to a woman named Lexie Brown.

articles.title: Fact check: Did Klay Thompson actually say “Never getting into another relationship again” amid rumors of Megan Thee Stallion cheating on him?
articles.description: Megan Thee Stallion and the Dallas Mavericks’ star player, Klay Thompson, had inspired billions with their love, only for her to accuse him of allegedly cheating on her, sparking chaos. Megan Thee Stallion has now confirmed that she has ended things with Klay Thompson after she found him cheating on her. Amid this, there are claims of her cheating on him.

articles.title: Jaleel asks Fadnavis to resign over failing law and order in state
articles.description: AIMIM's Imtiaz Jaleel slammed the Maharashtra govt and CM Fadnavis for failing to maintain law and order. He said if the Home Minister can't ensure safety, he should resign, and if police can't keep peace, they should "sit at home".

articles.title: Magnitude 6.1 Earthquake Hits Japan's Hokkaido Region, No Tsunami
articles.description: A 6.1 magnitude quake hits Japan's Hokkaido region, with a seismic intensity of '5+'. No tsunami warning was issued or major damage reported. This comes days after a 7.5 magnitude quake in northern Japan that triggered a tsunami warning.

articles.title: “They are deeply connected”: Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini’s drama takes a new turn amid claims of unresolved emotions between them
articles.description: Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini remain the talk of the town even as they try to disappear from the public eye amid their alleged affair rumors, sparking outrage among millions. As Mike Vrabel seeks some time off to be with his family as he faces a difficult time in his personal life, Dianna Russini has deleted her account on X.

articles.title: AAP wiped out in Rajya Sabha: BJP's Shahnawaz Hussain on defections
articles.description: BJP leader Shahnawaz Hussain claims AAP is 'wiped out' in the Rajya Sabha after its MPs defected. This comes as AAP's Sanjay Singh petitioned the Rajya Sabha Chairman to disqualify 7 MPs who joined BJP, challenging the merger's legality.

articles.title: MP CM Mohan Yadav praises PM Modi's 'Mann Ki Baat' for awareness
articles.description: MP CM Mohan Yadav lauded PM Modi's 'Mann Ki Baat' for raising awareness. In the latest episode, the PM celebrated India's wind energy capacity crossing 56 GW, a milestone that positions the country fourth globally in wind power generation.

articles.title: IRS officer's daughter murder: Police recover victim's, stolen phones
articles.description: Accused Rahul Meena led Delhi Police to recover two mobile phones, including the victim's, in the IRS officer's daughter murder case. He is in police custody as investigators await a DNA profiling report, which is expected within 15 days.

articles.title: Can Lucknow Super Giants Qualify For IPL 2026 Playoffs? All Scenarios Explained
articles.description: Lucknow Super Giants will qualify for the IPL 2026 playoffs if they win all of their remaining six league matches with big margins.

articles.title: Magadh university gets AICTE nod for MCA course
articles.description: Exciting news from Magadh University! Beginning with the 2026-27 academic year, they will introduce a brand-new Master of Computer Applications (MCA) program, having secured AICTE approval. This initiative will roll out at the picturesque Bodh Gaya campus, with 60 coveted seats available for eager students looking to expand their horizons in technology.

articles.title: Odisha govt docs threaten to quit over unfulfilled demands
articles.description: Odisha government doctors, under the Odisha Medical Service Association (OMSA), are threatening to resign en masse due to unresolved issues of pay parity, cadre restructuring, and dynamic assured career progression. Despite government assurances in January, no significant steps have been taken, prompting the doctors to consider mass resignation.

articles.title: NASA satellite spots gleaming halo around New Zealand’s Chatham Islands
articles.description: NASA satellite spots gleaming halo around New Zealand’s Chatham Islands

articles.title: Veggies, Not Jhalmuri: Mamata Banerjee's Casual Response To PM Modi's Snack Break
articles.description: Mamata Banerjee held a footmarch in Bhabanipur, where the BJP has fielded Suvendu Adhikari.

articles.title: Land Dealer Vineet Tiwary Found Dead in Daltonganj, Police Detain One Suspect
articles.description: A land dealer, Vineet Tiwary, was found dead in Daltonganj a day after he went missing. Police recovered his body from a roadside shrub in a semi-naked condition. Tiwary was forcibly taken from his home by five individuals, and an investigation suggests a land dispute may be the motive.

articles.title: Two youths held for hurling petrol bomb in Ranipet over previous enmity
articles.description: Two youths arrested for throwing a petrol bomb at a VCK functionary’s house in Ranipet over a rivalry.

articles.title: Will launch yatra from E Champaran on May 3: Nishant
articles.description: Will launch yatra from E Champaran on May 3: Nishant

articles.title: Iran FM meets Army Chief Munir after returning to Pakistan amid uncertainty over peace talks with US
articles.description: US Iran talks: Iranian FM Abbas Araghchi meets Pakistan Army chief Asim Munir during brief Islamabad stop as uncertainty clouds next round of negotiations. Visit follows Oman talks, Trump remarks, and ongoing regional diplomatic efforts.

articles.title: Metro rail services to remain suspended today for inspection
articles.description: Attention commuters! Patna Metro will pause operations on Monday, April 27, to allow the Commissioner of Metro Rail Safety to conduct a pivotal safety inspection along the Bhootnath to Malahi Pakri line. This 2.75-kilometer stretch is on the brink of becoming operational.

articles.title: Iran Presents ‘Amended Proposal Of Framework’ To End US-Israel Conflict: Exclusive
articles.description: If the Muscat meetings and Araghchi’s follow-up Islamabad tour remain fruitful then United States and Iran may resume second round of Islamabad talks soon, said sources

articles.title: Oral-B iO9 electric toothbrush review: Oral hygiene reimagined
articles.description: Oral-B's iO Series 9 electric toothbrush brings data-driven insights to your daily routine. With seven cleaning modes, a helpful pressure sensor, and real-time mouth zone tracking via a smartphone app, it aims to refine brushing habits. While not perfect, its advanced features offer unparalleled feedback for those seeking to optimize oral hygiene, though at a premium price.

articles.title: Divyenndu CONFIRMS Madgaon Express Sequel, Says, 'Kunal Kemmu Is Working On The Script'
articles.description: Divyenndu confirms Madgaon Express sequel is in the works, with Kunal Kemmu writing the script, as the hit comedy continues to enjoy strong fan love.

articles.title: Karnataka hiding health details of ailing minister Sudhakar to misuse his thumb impression, alleges Kumaraswamy
articles.description: Karnataka Planning and Statistics Minister D Sudhakar is under intensive care at a hospital in Bengaluru’s Electronics City.

articles.title: BDL delivers the first indigenous wire-guided heavyweight torpedo to NSTL
articles.description: Bharat Dynamics Limited delivers indigenous heavy-weight torpedo to Naval Science and Technological Laboratory, boosting India’s self-reliance in advanced naval weapon systems.

articles.title: PM Modi Visits Thanthania Kalibari Temple Ahead of Kolkata Road Show - In Pics
articles.description: Ahead of the second phase of the West Bengal Assembly Elections 2026, Prime Minister Narendra Modi offered prayers at Thakurbari, the main temple of the Matua Mahasangha at Thakurnagar on Sunday, April 26. The temple visit was followed by the PM's poll rally in the area in North 24 Parganas. Later in the day, he also prayed to Maa Kali, at the Thanthania Kalibari Temple. ​

articles.title: Indian IT Faces AI Reset: Top-Five Firms Post Mixed FY26 Amid Macro Headwinds
articles.description: While TCS and Infosys signalled that the worst macro headwinds are receding, peers like HCLTech and Wipro flagged continued volatility and soft discretionary spending.

articles.title: Horoscope Tomorrow, April 27, 2026: Something may come to an end to clear space for a new beginning
articles.description: Horoscope Tomorrow: Find out the astrological prediction for zodiac signs for April 27, 2026.

articles.title: Jaipur’s Timeless Block Prints, Reimagined By A London Designer Who Found Home In The Pink City
articles.description: English florals, reimagined through block printing, move beyond traditional motifs to give the age-old craft a distinctly modern edge.

articles.title: Want to record your iPhone screen with audio: Here’s how to do it
articles.description: Assassin's Creed IV: Black Flag is getting a full remake, titled 'Black Flag Resynced', launching July 9th. This reimagined version boasts significant visual upgrades including ray tracing and dynamic weather. PC players will enjoy unlocked frame rates, HDR, and extensive monitor support, with detailed system requirements provided for various performance targets.

articles.title: Raja Shivaji to Tanhaji: 5 Movies Made On The Life, Legacy of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj; Check
articles.description: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj isn't just a hero for all Indians; his life has also inspired many filmmakers. We're taking a look at six such movies that brought the legendary Maratha warrior's story to the big screen

articles.title: Man arrested for stabbing wife in Delhi’s Sonia Vihar over domestic dispute
articles.description: A 38-year-old woman was critically injured in an alleged stabbing by her husband in northeast Delhi's Sonia Vihar. Police have arrested the accused, 35-year-old Manoj Kumar, following a heated argument linked to marital disputes. The incident highlights a rise in spousal violence cases in the city.

articles.title: Who Is Cole Allen? NASA Fellow And Teacher Accused In White House Dinner Shooting
articles.description: Who Is Cole Allen? NASA Fellow And Teacher Accused In White House Dinner Shooting

articles.title: Bank employees’ next pay hike moves early as govt asks PSBs to finish talks in 12 months
articles.description: The 13th bipartite settlement is due from November 2027, but the government wants PSBs to finish wage talks within a year.

articles.title: Rhea Chakraborty's Bank Accounts Released: Why Were They Frozen Amid Sushant Singh Rajput Case - EXPLAINED
articles.description: Rhea Chakraborty recently received legal relief as a Mumbai court ordered the release of her and her family’s frozen bank accounts, which were blocked in 2020 during the Narcotics Control Bureau’s probe linked to Sushant Singh Rajput’s case.

articles.title: One in three Gen Z men believe a wife should obey her husband: What the research reveals about gender and power
articles.description: A global survey reveals a surprising trend: a significant portion of Gen Z men hold traditional views on marriage and gender roles, contradicting expectations of progressive attitudes. While many admire successful women, a substantial number believe wives should obey husbands and men should have the final say in family decisions, sparking concerns about future gender equality.

articles.title: Trump survives White House dinner shooting scare as armed 'tutor' held -- key points
articles.description: A shooting scare near the White House Correspondents' Dinner forced the evacuation of President Trump and other top officials. The suspect, identified as Cole Tomas Allen, was apprehended after allegedly charging a security checkpoint with multiple weapons. An officer was shot but saved by a bulletproof vest. Investigations into the motive are ongoing.

articles.title: Persian proverb of the day: ‘Medicine after the death of Sohrab’ - a lesson on timely action and regret
articles.description: We often realize mistakes and seek remedies only after irreversible damage has occurred, a sentiment captured by the Persian proverb 'Medicine after the death of Sohrab.' This poignant saying highlights the regret of delayed action, emphasizing that timely intervention is crucial, as the best solutions can become useless once the opportune moment has passed.

articles.title: Olivia Rodrigo debuts heartbreaking new song with Weyes Blood at secret LA show: 'Karaokable if you’re sad'
articles.description: At a hush-hush LA concert, Olivia Rodrigo shared her latest emotionally charged ballad, featuring the ethereal voice of Weyes Blood, hinting at her much-anticipated album 'you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love,' scheduled for release on June 12. Fans were treated to a mix of her greatest hits and an unexpected cameo at Coachella 2026.

articles.title: Orange alert for heatwave in Delhi, sweltering hot weather conditions to continue for 3 days
articles.description: The minimum temperatures are expected to remain in the range of 25-27°C, and maximum temperatures are likely to hover around 43-45°C
